mapper.select: select tsr.role_id, tsr.role_code, tsr.role_name, tsr.owner_id, trugl.id as link_id, trugl.valid_from, trugl.expire_on, trugl.status, trugl.app_id from t_sys_role tsr join t_role_user_group_link trugl on tsr.role_id = trugl.role_id and trugl.is_deleted = 0 and tsr.app_id = trugl.app_id ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select tsr.role_id, tsr.role_code, tsr.role_name, case when trugl.user_group_id is not null then 1 else 0 end as disabled from t_sys_role tsr left join t_role_user_group_link trugl on tsr.role_id = trugl.role_id and trugl.is_deleted = 0 and tsr.app_id = trugl.app_id and trugl.user_group_id = #{userGroupId} where tsr.is_deleted = 0

select tsug.group_id, tsug.group_name, tsug.group_type, tsug.intro, tsug.owner_id, tsug.owner_name, trugl.id as link_id, trugl.valid_from, trugl.expire_on, trugl.status from t_sys_user_group tsug join t_role_user_group_link trugl on tsug.group_id = trugl.user_group_id and trugl.is_deleted = 0 ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}

select tsug.group_id, tsug.group_name, case when trugl.role_id is not null then 1 else 0 end as disabled from t_sys_user_group tsug left join t_role_user_group_link trugl on tsug.group_id = trugl.user_group_id and trugl.is_deleted = 0 and trugl.role_id = #{roleId} where tsug.is_deleted = 0
